seoTitle: Glen Nevis vs Glen Ward — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Nevis and Glen Ward. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Nevis vs Glen Ward: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Nevis and Glen Ward.
heading: Glen Nevis vs Glen Ward — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Nevis, New South Wales and Glen Ward, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Ward has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Glen Nevis (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Nevis or Glen Ward safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Nevis has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Glen Ward scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Nevis scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Ward scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Nevis or Glen Ward?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Ward has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
